creator: timur@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Derek Schrock from comment #59)

Yeh, this one I missed completely! I was made this way as module didn't work at all out of the box, but thanks to the patch, provided by Andrew Walker that is(at least for 13.1+) is fixed.

So I'm removing this option again and related changes.

Also, vfs_freebsd compiles now, but need to be tested, which is a bit hard with the absence of UFS2 disks around.
